name: mirrors the universal-9 answers unchanged into the v1.1 profile (universal stays universal)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA on Kubernetes" --answers p.json --probe-answer react_rendering_model=spa --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("v11.json")); exit(p["answers"]["criticality"]=="mission-critical" && p["answers"]["compliance_regime"]=="soc2" ? 0:1)' && echo universal-mirrored 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
